
---
title: "Colleagues' Theses"
bibliography: refs.bib
---

## [Found speech and humans in the loop: Ways to gain insight into large quantities of speech](https://urn.kb.se/resolve?urn=urn:nbn:se:kth:diva-309031) [@]

## [Adaptive Robot Presenters: Modelling Grounding in Multimodal Interaction](https://urn.kb.se/resolve?urn=urn:nbn:se:kth:diva-338178) [@Axelsson1805218]

## [Ask and distract: Data-driven methods for the automatic generation of multiple-choice reading comprehension questions from Swedish texts](https://urn.kb.se/resolve?urn=urn:nbn:se:kth:diva-336531) [@Kalpakchi1797477]

## [Robots Beyond Borders: The Role of Social Robots in Spoken Second Language Practice](https://urn.kb.se/resolve?urn=urn:nbn:se:kth:diva-343863) [@Cumbal1840732]

## [Probabilistic Speech & Motion Synthesis: Towards More Expressive and Multimodal Generative Models](https://urn.kb.se/resolve?urn=urn:nbn:se:kth:diva-368342) [@Mehta1988881]

## [Evaluation of Artificial Intelligence in the Medical Domain: Speech, Language and Applications](https://urn.kb.se/resolve?urn=urn:nbn:se:kth:diva-371738) [@Moell2007130]

## [Bittersweet Lessons in Music AI Research: Neural Instrument Synthesis, Multi-modal Representations, Symbolic Music Generation](https://urn.kb.se/resolve?urn=urn:nbn:se:kth:diva-377801) [@Jonason2043729]

<!-- makes quarto render properly -->
